tools.title: Perforce Sync Helper (Nuke-Integrated)
tools.descriptionHtml: Perforce integration in Nuke, allowing users to stay up to date with a single click.
bulletsHtml: Finds missing Read media from inside Nuke script
One-click sync workflow ensures all Read nodes are up-to-date
Quick and tuneable pruning of files not in active Nuke script

tools.title: Autocrop GUI — Range + Padding
tools.descriptionHtml: Custom Autocrop interface, allowing the user better control of bounding boxes with functionality not in the regular autocrop function.
bulletsHtml: Custom panel: First / Last / Increment, Layer, and total Padding
Custom options allow for quicker processing
Adds a Padding (px) knob and expands the crop box via expressions so the original autocrop animation is preserved

tools.title: Transform — Concatenate / Split Operations
tools.descriptionHtml: Pair of hotbox utilities for breaking a Transform into readable per-operation nodes, then recombining them back into a single Transform.
tools.ariaLabel: Transform concatenate and split operations preview
bulletsHtml: Split Transform Operations: splits translate/rotate/scale/skew (and optional center) into separate Transform nodes while preserving animation/expressions and skew order
Concatenate Transforms: recombines a straight chain back into one Transform (non-destructive)
Smartly splits based off of knobs with non-default values

tools.title: Roto — Split Shapes into Nodes
tools.descriptionHtml: Converts a dense Roto/RotoPaint into multiple nodes so shapes can be isolated for troubleshooting, performance optimization, or per-shape effects. Inspired by a similar tool from Alex Villabon.
bulletsHtml: Creates one new node per shape (All), per selected shape, or per top-level folder (Layers mode)
Copies the original node’s settings and preserves animation/expressions where possible
Auto-labels new nodes using the shape or folder name

tools.title: Label Manager
tools.descriptionHtml: Simple and highly repeatable Labeling system to keep artists organized.
bulletsHtml: Standardized label patterns to reduce unidentified nodes
Auto-update behavior to keep labels consistent as scripts evolve
Per-framenob values directly in label for quick value checks

tools.title: Portable .nuke Bootstrap (Init/Menu System)
tools.descriptionHtml: Portable startup + menu system that auto-loads tool folders, builds menus dynamically, making new gizmos work right away.
bulletsHtml: Auto-loads Python tools, gizmos, ToolSets, icons, sounds, presets, and workspaces
Dynamic menu generation to keep gizmos organized
Automatically works with tool libraries like PxF, Nuke Survival Toolkit

tools.title: Read Node — Repath Toolkit
tools.descriptionHtml: Read-node hotbox utilities for fast repathing and sequence refresh during transfers and shot updates.
bulletsHtml: Replace All File Paths: selects all Reads/Writes and opens Nuke’s filename search/replace for global repaths
Frame Range to Files: rebuilds the Read path using the detected sequence + frame range from disk
Designed to reduce “missing Read” cleanup time when moving between machines/drives

tools.title: Read Node — Timing / Alignment
tools.descriptionHtml: Quick alignment helpers for setting Read start frames consistently across a comp.
tools.ariaLabel: Read Node Timing and Alignment preview
bulletsHtml: At Comp Start: sets selected Reads to start at the script’s first frame
At Current Playhead: sets selected Reads to start at the current timeline frame
Supports batching across multiple selected Reads to keep timing consistent

tools.title: Edge Mid Finder
tools.descriptionHtml: Precision helper for finding/validating edge positions for roto and patch alignment.
bulletsHtml: Supports consistent edge placement (less eyeballing)
Gives roto artists a mathematically true midpoint to base their edges off of
Calculates blur radius of given edge

tools.title: Version & Render Discipline Helpers
tools.descriptionHtml: "JL_Precomp", intelligently designed Precomp Switch focused on predictable output naming/structure and reducing version mismatches.
tools.ariaLabel: Version and Render Discipline Helpers preview
bulletsHtml: Easily readable toggle, color-coded with explicit read and write nodes
Read and write nodes are synchronized, eliminating incorrect versioning

tools.title: Backup Node — Safety Function
tools.descriptionHtml: One-click backup of a node before risky edits (tracking tweaks, keyframe cleanup, etc).
bulletsHtml: Duplicates the selected node(s) into a _Backup copy for quick rollback
Quickly disconnects inputs and rewires to current node
Disables the backup copy and consistently offsets it in the node graph for obvious correlation

tools.title: Render Output Utilities
tools.descriptionHtml: Write-node utilities for faster iteration and cleaner output management once render paths and settings are already in place.
bulletsHtml: Version Up + Render bumps a selected Write node to the next version and renders in one step
Preserves existing render setup behavior, including using the Write node’s frame limits when enabled (otherwise the project range)
Rename Image Sequence updates both the sequence folder and filename stem together while preserving padding and extension (e.g. %04d, ####, .exr)

tools.title: Frame Utilities
tools.descriptionHtml: Timeline and clipboard helpers for quickly copying frame references and navigating frame ranges during comp work.
bulletsHtml: One-click copy for first, last, and current frame values
Copies both the project frame range and active Viewer playback in/out range
Jump N Frames tool moves from the current frame to an inclusive end frame, with optional clipboard copy of the destination frame

tools.title: Performance Timers Toggle
tools.descriptionHtml: One-click toggle for Nuke performance timers with version-safe checks and clear start/stop feedback.
bulletsHtml: Toggles performance timers on/off directly from a Hotbox button during script profiling
Uses API fallbacks to stay robust across Nuke versions and different builds
Optionally resets timer values before starting and prints clear STARTED/STOPPED status in the Script Editor
